entities.name: GENDER EQUALITY AND SOCIAL INCLUSION (GESI) FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A framework designed to incorporate gender equality and social inclusion into climate information services

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES (CIS)
entities.description: Services that provide climate-related information to support decision-making and adaptation

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting the environment

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Variations in the mean state and other statistics of the climate on all spatial and temporal scales

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: A social construct defining the roles and expectations of women and men

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL AND CLIMATE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used to deliver agricultural and climate-related data and insights

entities.name: LITERATURE REVIEW
entities.description: A methodological approach used to analyze existing research to inform a framework or project

entities.name: AICCRA PROJECT
entities.description: The Accelerating Impacts of CGIAR Climate Research for Africa project

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used for the design, development, and delivery of climate information

entities.name: CONWAY'S LAW
entities.description: A principle stating that technological innovations are a projection of the values of their creators

entities.name: GENDER TARGETING BY INTENTIONAL DESIGN
entities.description: An indicator focusing on the intentional inclusion of gender considerations during the design phase

entities.name: COLLECTION OF SEX-DISAGGREGATED DATA
entities.description: The process of gathering data separated by sex to identify gender-specific trends

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF SEX-DISAGGREGATED DATA
entities.description: The process of analyzing data separated by sex to understand differential impacts

entities.name: DISSEMINATION OF TECHNOLOGICAL OPTIONS
entities.description: The process of distributing technological solutions to diverse user groups

entities.name: CONTINUOUS MONITORING OF GENDER AND EMPOWERMENT EVALUATION
entities.description: The ongoing process of monitoring gender dynamics and evaluating empowerment outcomes

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DATA HUB
entities.description: A focal development area for centralizing agricultural data

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES TRAINING
entities.description: A focal development area providing training on the use of climate information services

entities.name: FLOOD AND DROUGHT INDICATORS
entities.description: A focal development area focusing on indicators for flood and drought events

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: A country in Africa where the focal development areas are being implemented

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country involved in the AICCRA Project

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country involved in the AICCRA Project

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country involved in the AICCRA Project

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country involved in the AICCRA Project

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country involved in the AICCRA Project

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the AICCRA Project and CIS research are focused
